allow: PowerShell($py = try { \(python --version\) } catch { "NO" }; $py3 = try { \(python3 --version\) } catch { "NO" }; $pip = try { \(pip --version\) } catch { "NO" }; $ff = try { \(ffmpeg -version | Select-Object -First 1\) } catch { "NO" }; "python: $py"; "python3: $py3"; "pip: $pip"; "ffmpeg: $ff")
